channel.title: Sotheby's on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Sotheby's on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: T-Rex Auction Raises Concerns
item.description:
Introduction to the Auction  

Sotheby’s is auctioning off a rare 67-million-year-old Tyrannosaurus rex skeleton, dubbed Gus, on July 14. The skeleton is expected to fetch up to $30 million and will go to the highest bidder, whether a public museum or a private collector. This auction has raised concerns among scientists and experts, who worry that the fossil will end up in private hands, making it inaccessible for future research.
